★ Premium Quality · Ajman, UAE

Precision in Every Instrument, Perfection in Every Procedure.

Dental, surgical and medical instruments manufactured from medical-grade stainless steel — precision engineered, corrosion resistant and fully autoclavable. Supplied at wholesale terms to clinics, hospitals and distributors worldwide.

Request a Wholesale QuoteAbout Our Company
Premium QualityPrecision EngineeredAutoclave SafeTrusted by Professionals
Product Range

Wide range of dental & surgical instruments

Restorative, diagnostic, isolation and impression instruments — every piece medical-grade stainless steel, autoclavable and supplied at wholesale terms.

Product Code · MFZ-D101

Composite Set — Gold Series

Precision in Every Detail.

A six-piece set of composite instruments, expertly crafted for the precise placement, contouring and finishing of composite restorations. Gold-tone coated working ends reduce material adhesion for cleaner, faster layering.

  • Six double-ended instruments covering placement, contouring and finishing
  • Gold-tone coated, low-adhesion working ends
  • Precision tip technology for controlled composite handling
Product Code · MFZ-D102

Composite Set — Blue Titanium Series

Precision in Every Detail.

The Blue Titanium Series brings the same six-piece composite configuration with titanium-blue coated working ends for high visual contrast against restorative material — precise placement, contouring and finishing with maximum control.

  • Six double-ended instruments in a matched clinical set
  • Titanium-blue coated tips for contrast and low adhesion
  • Precision tip technology for accurate contouring
Product Code · MFZ-D103

PMT Set

Precision. Control. Confidence.

A core examination and restorative set designed for the placement, manipulation and finishing of permanent restorations with maximum accuracy and efficiency — the everyday backbone of the operatory.

  • High-quality stainless steel construction throughout
  • Precision tips for accurate handling and placement
  • Ergonomic knurled handles for secure grip and control
Product Code · MFZ-D104

Chrome Removal Set

Precision Cleaning. Perfect Results.

Specially designed instruments for the efficient and safe removal of chrome and debris, ensuring a smooth, clean surface every time. Supplied as a complete set with interchangeable precision tips and ergonomic handle.

  • Complete set with handle and interchangeable precision tips
  • High-quality stainless steel, precision-engineered working ends
  • Designed for controlled, damage-free chrome and debris removal
Product Code · MFZ-D105

Rubber Dam Clamp

Secure Isolation. Superior Control.

Engineered for a firm and reliable grip, our Rubber Dam Clamp ensures maximum stability and patient safety during every procedure — dependable isolation that stays exactly where it is placed.

  • Strong, secure grip with consistent spring tension
  • Precision-engineered jaw design for stable seating
  • Durable medical-grade stainless steel body
Product Code · MFZ-D106

Impression Tray — 10 Piece Set

Accurate Impressions. Maximum Comfort.

High-quality, autoclavable impression trays designed for accurate impressions and maximum patient comfort. Supplied as a ten-piece set of perforated upper and lower trays in assorted sizes.

  • Ten-piece set of upper and lower trays in assorted sizes
  • Premium stainless steel with perforated design for better retention
  • Smooth, rounded edges for patient comfort
Product Code · MFZ-D107

Tweezer — 10 mm Hollow Handle

Precision Grip. Superior Control.

Ergonomically designed with a 10 mm hollow handle for reduced hand fatigue and enhanced precision in every use — balanced, light and exact, procedure after procedure.

  • 10 mm hollow handle for better balance and reduced fatigue
  • Precision tips for accurate handling of small items
  • Serrated grip zone for secure, slip-free control
Available on Request

Surgical & Medical Instruments

Full range supplied to order.

Extraction forceps, scissors, needle holders, elevators, retractors, examination instruments, dressing forceps, kidney trays and more — manufactured to the same medical-grade standard as our dental line.

Request Specifications
Why Choose Us

Built for buyers who cannot compromise

Our commitments behind every order — from a single set to full-container wholesale supply.

🏅

Premium Quality

Consistent, inspected quality across every production batch.

🔩

Medical Grade Stainless Steel

Manufactured from surgical stainless steel for clinical use.

🎯

Precision Engineered

Fine tolerances and accurate working ends, instrument after instrument.

🛡️

Corrosion Resistant

Finishes that withstand repeated cleaning and clinical environments.

♨️

Fully Autoclavable

Safe for standard autoclave sterilization cycles and reuse.

🌍

Worldwide Shipping

Export from the UAE to markets across Asia, Africa and beyond.

📦

Wholesale Supply

Bulk quantities and repeat-order reliability for distributors.

💬

Reliable Support

Responsive pre-sales and after-sales assistance on WhatsApp and email.

💰

Competitive Pricing

Direct-from-source pricing structured for trade and resale.

How to Order

From enquiry to delivery in five steps

01

Enquiry

Send your product list, quantities and destination by WhatsApp or email.

02

Quotation

Receive a consolidated wholesale quotation with pricing tiers and lead time.

03

Confirmation

Confirm your order; in-stock items are prepared immediately.

04

Inspection & Packing

Instruments pass final inspection and are packed for export.

05

Dispatch

Your consignment ships by air or sea freight with tracking details.

Export & Shipping

Markets we serve

Ready stock in the UAE with fast international dispatch by air and sea freight. Worldwide shipping available upon request, depending on destination and freight availability.

United Arab EmiratesIndiaPakistanBangladeshSri LankaNepal

Ready to stock your clinic or supply your network?

Send your product list and quantities — wholesale enquiries are answered promptly, Sunday to Friday, UAE business hours.

Chat on WhatsApp

MINA FZC LLC is a UAE-based manufacturer, supplier, wholesaler and exporter of dental, surgical and medical instruments made from medical-grade stainless steel.

Precision in Every Instrument, Perfection in Every Procedure.
